what_it_measures: Number of prior transactions by sender
why_it_might_indicate_risk: High prior activity may indicate burst behavior or unusually active accounts

what_it_measures: Time gap since sender's previous transaction
why_it_might_indicate_risk: Very short gaps may indicate rapid transaction bursts

what_it_measures: Current amount relative to sender's prior average amount
why_it_might_indicate_risk: Large deviations from normal transaction size may be suspicious

what_it_measures: Current amount relative to receiver's prior average amount
why_it_might_indicate_risk: Sudden jumps in receiving behavior may indicate suspicious concentration
